meta.title: Stema Tech S.r.l. – Precision components for home appliances, automotive and electrical applications
meta.description: Stema Tech S.r.l. manufactures precision components for home appliances, automotive and electrical applications, with advanced production departments and certified quality control.
hero.title: Precision components for home appliances, automotive, die casting and electrical applications
hero.subtitle: From engineering to serial production, we support industrial manufacturers with certified processes and advanced production departments.
hero.stat1.label: years of experience
hero.stat2.label: components produced / year
hero.stat3.label: integrated production departments
solutions.title: Solutions for key industrial sectors
solutions.subtitle: We support OEMs and tier-one suppliers with components designed to meet the technical, regulatory and reliability requirements of each industry.
solutions.homeAppliances.title: Home appliances
solutions.homeAppliances.body: Metal components and sub-assemblies for washing machines, dishwashers, refrigerators and other major appliances.
solutions.electrical.title: Electrical applications
solutions.electrical.body: Parts for switches, panels and power distribution equipment with tight tolerances and specific finishes.
solutions.automotive.title: Automotive
solutions.automotive.body: Precision components for safety, comfort and powertrain systems compliant with automotive standards.
solutions.dieCasting.title: Die casting & plastics
solutions.dieCasting.body: Components and inserts for die-casting and plastic molding tools, with high wear resistance.
solutions.spareParts.title: Spare parts & service
solutions.spareParts.body: Dedicated spare part production and small batches for maintenance and upgrade programs.
capabilities.title: Integrated capabilities, from design to inspection
capabilities.subtitle: A continuous production flow starting from engineering and ending in quality control, ensuring stable lead times and repeatability.
capabilities.engineering.title: Engineering
capabilities.engineering.body: Technical support, co-design and industrialization to optimize cost and manufacturability.
capabilities.edm.title: EDM
capabilities.edm.body: Wire and sinker EDM for complex geometries and tight tolerances.
capabilities.milling.title: Milling
capabilities.milling.body: Multi-axis machining centers for high-precision operations.
capabilities.turning.title: Turning
capabilities.turning.body: CNC lathes for prototype and serial production.
capabilities.grinding.title: Grinding
capabilities.grinding.body: Surface and cylindrical grinding for controlled surface finish.
capabilities.assembly.title: Assembly
capabilities.assembly.body: Mechanical assemblies and integrated functional checks.
capabilities.quality.title: Quality control
capabilities.quality.body: Dedicated metrology lab with certified measurement equipment.
products.title: Representative components
products.subtitle: A selection of typical components manufactured for our customers, showing geometries, materials and finishes.
products.item1.title: Components for home appliances
products.item1.body: Pins, brackets and metal supports for washing machines and dishwashers, with anti-corrosion treatments.
products.item2.title: Parts for electrical equipment
products.item2.body: Contacts, terminals and structural parts for industrial panels and switchgear.
products.item3.title: Automotive components
products.item3.body: Precision mechanical components for safety and comfort systems.
products.item4.title: Tool inserts
products.item4.body: Inserts for die casting and plastic molding tools with high wear resistance.
gallery.title: A look at our production areas
gallery.subtitle: Representative views of key departments and machining lines.
gallery.slide1.caption: EDM line for precision machining of complex geometries.
gallery.slide2.caption: Milling department with multi-axis machining centers.
gallery.slide3.caption: Quality lab with certified measuring equipment.
process.title: A continuous process, from design to inspection
process.subtitle: Each component follows structured stages with clear control points and responsibilities.
process.step1.title: Analysis & co-design
process.step1.body: Requirement alignment, functional analysis and design support.
process.step2.title: Industrialization
process.step2.body: Definition of cycles, tooling and control plans.
process.step3.title: Machining
process.step3.body: EDM, milling, turning and grinding according to specification.
process.step4.title: Assembly
process.step4.body: Assemblies and functional checks integrated into the line.
process.step5.title: Final tests & shipping
process.step5.body: Final inspections, documentation and logistics to the customer.
quality.title: Certified quality, traceable controls
quality.subtitle: Structured procedures, dedicated measuring equipment and international certifications ensure batch compliance over time.
quality.item2: Dedicated metrology lab with CMM and certified instruments.
quality.item3: Batch traceability and structured documentation management.
quality.item4: Quality support for PPAP, sampling and customer audits.
quality.certifications.title: Certifications
company.title: A long-term industrial partner
company.subtitle: A flexible, specialized structure that combines technical expertise, continuous investments and production capacity.
company.body1: Stema Tech S.r.l. supports customers in the design and production of precision components, with a strong focus on technical collaboration and quality.
company.body2: The company integrates multiple production departments on the same site, reducing lead times and simplifying the management of complex projects.

resources.case1.body: Co-design with the customer to reduce the number of parts and assembly time.
resources.case2.title: New EDM line
resources.case2.body: Investment in a new EDM line to manage more complex geometries.
